name: CASCADE Templates Collection
description: Alle CASCADE Templates für Copy-Paste Workflow mit BFAgent MCP

feature_request.name: Feature Request
feature_request.text:
### Request: [FEATURE NAME]

**Ziel:**
[WAS SOLL ERREICHT WERDEN?]

**Requirements:**
- [ ] Requirement 1
- [ ] Requirement 2
- [ ] Requirement 3

**Constraints:**
- [EINSCHRÄNKUNGEN]

**Tools:**
- [x] BFAgent MCP für Best Practices
- [x] Check Protected Paths

**Plan:**
[x] Zeig mir erst den Plan

**Testing:**
- [ ] [TESTING REQUIREMENTS]

quick_task.name: Quick Task
quick_task.text:
Task: [ONE-LINER]

Requirements:
- [ ] Thing 1
- [ ] Thing 2
- [ ] Thing 3

Tools: BFAgent MCP best_practices

Plan: show first

bug_fix.name: Bug Fix
bug_fix.text:
### Bug Fix: [PROBLEM]

**Symptom:**
[WAS FUNKTIONIERT NICHT?]

**Error Message:**
```
[ERROR]
```

**Location:**
- File: [PATH]
- Function: [NAME]

**Expected Behavior:**
[WAS SOLLTE PASSIEREN?]

**Tools:**
- [x] BFAgent MCP Protected Paths checken

refactoring.name: Refactoring
refactoring.text:
### Refactoring: [COMPONENT]

**Ziel:**
[WARUM REFACTOREN?]

**Scope:**
- Domain: [DOMAIN]
- Component: [TYPE]

**Safety Checks:**
- [x] BFAgent MCP: get_refactor_options('[DOMAIN]')
- [x] BFAgent MCP: check_path_protection()
- [x] BFAgent MCP: get_best_practices()

**Plan:**
[x] Zeig mir erst den Plan

minimal_request.name: Minimal Request
minimal_request.text:
@CASCADE:
Task: [BESCHREIBUNG]
Requirements: [LISTE]
Tools: BFAgent MCP
Plan: show first

context_request.name: Context Request
context_request.text:
@CASCADE: Context needed

**Frage:**
[WAS MÖCHTE ICH WISSEN?]

**Nutze:**
- [ ] code_search
- [ ] BFAgent MCP: search_handlers
- [ ] BFAgent MCP: get_domain

**Don't code yet - investigation only**

plan_request.name: Plan Request
plan_request.text:
@CASCADE: Zeig mir erst den Plan für:

[BESCHREIBUNG DER AUFGABE]

Schritte:
- [ ] Step 1
- [ ] Step 2
- [ ] Step 3

checkpoint.name: Checkpoint
checkpoint.text:
@CASCADE: Checkpoint

- Was ist der Stand?
- Was fehlt noch?
- Welche Requirements sind noch offen?

best_practices.name: BFAgent Best Practices
best_practices.text:
Frage BFAgent MCP nach Best Practices für: [THEMA]

Beispiele:
- handlers
- pydantic
- ai_integration
- testing
- error_handling
- performance

protected_paths.name: Protected Paths Check
protected_paths.text:
Check mit BFAgent MCP die Protected Paths für: [FILE_PATH]

IMMER vor Datei-Änderungen checken!

naming_convention.name: Naming Convention
naming_convention.text:
Hole Naming Convention von BFAgent MCP für: [DOMAIN]

Domains: books, core, expert_hub, ui_hub, etc.

domain_info.name: Domain Info
domain_info.text:
Zeige mir Domain Info via BFAgent MCP für: [DOMAIN]

Include:
- [x] Handlers
- [x] Phases
- [x] Status

search_handlers.name: Search Handlers
search_handlers.text:
Suche mit BFAgent MCP nach existierenden Handlers für: [FUNKTIONALITÄT]

Query: [z.B. "PDF parsing", "Character generation"]

refactor_options.name: Refactor Options
refactor_options.text:
Hole Refactoring Options von BFAgent MCP für Domain: [DOMAIN]

Zeige:
- Available components
- Risk level
- Dependencies
- Protected paths

get_domain.name: Get Domain Details
get_domain.text:
Nutze BFAgent MCP: get_domain()

Domain ID: [DOMAIN_ID]
Include handlers: [x]
Include phases: [x]
Response format: markdown

validate_handler.name: Validate Handler
validate_handler.text:
Validiere Handler mit BFAgent MCP:

Handler Code: [PATH_TO_HANDLER]
Strict Mode: [ ] yes [x] no

Erwarte Score: 0-100

create_domain.name: Create Domain
create_domain.text:
### New Domain: [DOMAIN_NAME]

**Purpose:**
[WAS MACHT DIESE DOMAIN?]

**Models:**
- [ ] Model 1: [name] - [purpose]

**Handlers:**
- [ ] Handler 1: [name] - [what it does]

**BFAgent MCP:**
- [x] get_naming_convention()
- [x] scaffold_domain()
- [x] Domain in domain_arts registrieren

create_handler.name: Create Handler
create_handler.text:
Erstelle Handler mit BFAgent MCP:

Handler Name: [NAME]
Domain: [DOMAIN]
Handler Type: [ai_powered/rule_based/hybrid]
Description: [BESCHREIBUNG]

Include Tests: [x] yes

create_view.name: Create View
create_view.text:
Erstelle View:

View Name: [NAME]
URL: /[path]/
Template: [app]/[name].html

Features:
- [ ] Feature 1
- [ ] Feature 2

Tools: BFAgent MCP

create_model.name: Create Model
create_model.text:
Erstelle Model:

Model Name: [NAME]
App: [APP]
Table Name: [prefix]_[name]

Fields:
- [ ] Field 1: [type]
- [ ] Field 2: [type]

Tools: BFAgent MCP naming

create_test.name: Create Test
create_test.text:
Erstelle Test:

Test Type: [unit/integration/e2e]
Target: [FILE_OR_FUNCTION]

Test Cases:
- [ ] Case 1
- [ ] Case 2

Tools: BFAgent MCP best_practices

golden_rules.name: Golden Rules
golden_rules.text:
🏆 CASCADE Golden Rules:

1. REQUIREMENTS FIRST
   → Liste was du willst

2. PLAN BEFORE CODE
   → "Zeig mir erst den Plan"

3. USE BFAGENT MCP
   → "Check mit BFAgent MCP"

Immer befolgen! ✅

continue_task.name: Continue Task
continue_task.text:
@CASCADE: Continue mit letzter Task

Context:
- Letzte Anfrage war: [BESCHREIBUNG]
- Stand ist: [STATUS]
- Nächster Schritt: [STEP]

Bitte fortfahren!

pause_task.name: Pause Task
pause_task.text:
@CASCADE: Pause aktuelle Task

Bitte speichere:
- [ ] Aktuellen Stand
- [ ] Offene TODOs
- [ ] Nächste Schritte

Dokumentiere in: ACTIVE_CONTEXT.md

start_session.name: Start Session
start_session.text:
@CASCADE: Neue Session starten

Session Goal: [HAUPTZIEL]

Tasks:
- [ ] Task 1
- [ ] Task 2

Erstelle Plan und ACTIVE_CONTEXT.md!

complete_session.name: Complete Session
complete_session.text:
@CASCADE: Session abschließen

Bitte erstelle:
- [ ] Session Summary
- [ ] Commit & Push vorbereiten
- [ ] Safe Restart Doku

Was wurde erreicht?

snapshot_status.name: Snapshot Status
snapshot_status.text:
@CASCADE: Status Snapshot

Checkpoint:
- Was ist der Stand?
- Was fehlt noch?
- Welche Files geändert?
- Bereit für Commit?

save_state.name: Save State
save_state.text:
@CASCADE: Save current state

Erstelle/Update:
- ACTIVE_CONTEXT.md
- Alle TODOs
- Offene Requirements

Für sicheren Restart!

usage.manual: Öffne diese Datei, suche Template, kopiere Text
usage.streamdeck: Nutze mit Super Macro Plugin für 1-Klick Copy
